assertions.title: Create-path finals match legacy fallback score sources or are explicitly skipped with distinct reasons

steps.action: Review the round-10815 final-score apply reconciliation and API-vs-legacy comparison.
steps.expected: Each legacy finalist should either import with the agreed fallback precedence, be marked `missing-member`, or be explicitly skipped as unattachable.
steps.observed: For round 10815 the final-score reconciliation reported `imported=266`, `missingMemberSkipped=2`, and `explicitSkipped=15`; the API-vs-legacy checker reported `reconciles=true`, `scoreMatchesLegacy=true`, and `explicitUnattachableFinalSkips=15`.

evidence.network: Review API results were compared to legacy final-result rows through the archived validation script.

assertions.title: Whole-round provisional history maps one-to-one to imported non-example submissions

steps.action: Run the provisional-score round-wide reconciliation for 10815.
steps.expected: Each imported non-example submission should have exactly one provisional summation and the imported provisional identity set should match imported submission identities one-to-one.
steps.observed: The provisional validator reported `checksPassed=true` with 1444 imported submissions and 1444 imported provisional summations; imported plus missing-member skipped provisional identities reconciled exactly to the 1445 legacy non-example rows.

evidence.network: GET /v6/submissions and GET /v6/reviewSummations snapshots were reconciled against legacy provisional rows.

assertions.title: Mixed-history members keep the full provisional score sequence and exclude examples

steps.action: Inspect the Marinov-specific provisional validation in the archived 10815 run.
steps.expected: Member 22664170 should retain the full 27-row provisional sequence ordered by legacySubmissionId and exclude example runs.
steps.observed: Marinov had 27 imported submissions and 27 provisional summations matching the 27-row legacy non-example sequence by `legacySubmissionId` with exact score parity; example runs remained excluded.

evidence.network: Member-scoped review and submission joins were compared against legacy provisional rows.

assertions.title: Imported legacy rounds create zero example review summations

steps.action: Inspect current API summary and archived review-summation snapshots for imported rounds.
steps.expected: No example submissions or review summations should exist after import.
steps.observed: Current API summary showed `submissionExampleCount=0` and `reviewExampleCount=0` for 10815, 13897, and 17948; archived final/provisional validation also reported `noExampleFinalSummations=true`.

evidence.network: GET /v6/submissions and GET /v6/reviewSummations API summaries were inspected with auth for reviewSummations.

assertions.title: Finalists without non-example submissions are explicitly skipped with a non-missing-member reason

steps.action: Inspect final-score reconciliation and skipped-artifact records for the unattachable-finalists fixture 10815.
steps.expected: Unattachable finalists should be recorded with a distinct non-missing-member reason and should not produce orphan finals.
steps.observed: Round 10815 recorded 15 `finalist-without-attachable-submission` skips and the score validator reported `noExampleFinalSummations=true` plus correct latest-submission attachment for imported finals.

evidence.network: Skipped artifact and Review API evidence were compared to legacy finalist rows.

assertions.title: Provisional history reconciles imported submissions and missing-member skips

steps.action: Inspect round-10815 provisional reconciliation output and skipped artifact.
steps.expected: Imported provisional rows plus missing-member provisional skips should reconcile one-for-one to the legacy non-example submission set.
steps.observed: Apply reported `legacyNonExampleProvisionalScores=1445`, `importedProvisionalScores=1444`, and `missingMemberSkippedProvisionalScores=1`; the archived reconciliation confirmed exact identity parity after combining imported and skipped rows.

evidence.network: Review API provisional output was reconciled against legacy submission_points rows.

assertions.title: Missing-member score skips suppress the member's full score footprint

steps.action: Inspect missing-member score entries for round 10815 and compare to review surfaces.
steps.expected: Missing members should not produce final or provisional review rows.
steps.observed: Member 22669623 was recorded in the skipped artifact for `final-score` and `provisional-score` (plus resource/submission) and did not appear as an imported final/provisional participant in the validated API-vs-legacy checks.

evidence.network: Review API and skipped-artifact comparison only.

assertions.title: Round 10815 reaches the fully reconciled expected footprint modulo missing-member skips

steps.action: Review the archived 10815 reconciliation checker against challenge/resources/submissions/review surfaces and skipped artifact.
steps.expected: The visible footprint plus missing-member skips should reconcile to the expected legacy totals and every visible review row should attach to a visible imported submission.
steps.observed: The checker reported resources `828+8=836`, submissions `1444+1=1445`, and visible submitters `266+1=267`; all visible reviewSummations referenced visible imported submissions. AGENTS.md documents the shared-fixture challenge status `ACTIVE` as a known pre-existing baseline that should not be treated as an importer regression.

evidence.network: Challenge API, Resource API, submissions API, and reviewSummations API were all used in the archived reconciliation.

assertions.title: Registered non-submitters stay resources-only while missing members stay fully skipped

steps.action: Inspect the archived participant and score reconciliation for 10815.
steps.expected: Registered non-submitters should appear only as resources; missing members should appear only in skipped artifacts and not on imported writable surfaces.
steps.observed: The reconciliation reported imported submission/final/provisional member sets plus skipped missing-member entries matching the legacy non-example submitter set; missing members were absent from imported resource/submission/score surfaces and present only in the skipped artifact.

evidence.network: Resource, submissions, and review APIs were compared against legacy participant roles.

assertions.title: Score history stays attached to the correct non-example submission across surfaces

steps.action: Review the archived Marinov cross-surface validation for 10815.
steps.expected: The latest imported non-example submission should carry the final score and provisional rows should attach only to imported non-example submissions.
steps.observed: Marinov's latest non-example submission timestamp `1180539064719` carried the attached final score, and the 27 provisional rows all joined to imported non-example submissions only.

evidence.network: Member-scoped submission/review joins were used for the archived validation.

assertions.title: Multi-round filters bound the entire import blast radius including skipped-member subsets

steps.action: Review the archived multi-round apply comparator for 10815 and 14272 with control round 17948.
steps.expected: Writes and skipped entries should stay confined to selected round ids and the control round should remain unchanged.
steps.observed: The archived apply summary reported `existing=1 (10815)` and `unresolved=1 (14272)`; the skipped artifact referenced only round 10815, and the control round 17948 remained unchanged in pre/post snapshots.

evidence.network: Challenge/resource/submission/review snapshots were compared before and after the multi-round apply run.

assertions.title: Missing-member skips suppress the member's entire writable footprint across surfaces

steps.action: Inspect the round-10815 missing-member artifact and the archived cross-surface consistency check.
steps.expected: Missing members should have no imported resource, submission, final, or provisional rows for the affected surfaces.
steps.observed: The consistency check found zero violations: missing-member entries corresponded to absent linked records on the affected surfaces, while resolvable members imported normally.

evidence.network: Resource, submissions, and review APIs were checked against skipped-artifact identities.

assertions.title: Skipped-file reasons stay consistent with linked-record presence across surfaces

steps.action: Run the archived skip-reason consistency checker for 10815.
steps.expected: Missing-member and non-missing-member reasons should align with the actual presence/absence of linked records on the affected surfaces.
steps.observed: The checker returned zero violations: `missing-member` entries mapped to absent linked records on the named surfaces, and `finalist-without-attachable-submission` entries remained distinct from missing-member cases.

evidence.network: Skipped-artifact and linked-record API comparison only.

frictions.description: The round-10815 shared fixture remains ACTIVE even though the original planning create-path validation created it as COMPLETED.
frictions.resolution: Applied the higher-precedence AGENTS.md guidance that this is a shared-fixture baseline issue, then validated the participant/score footprint modulo that known non-regression.

summary: Validated 13 score/cross assertions centered on round 10815 and the 10815/14272 multi-round filter: all passed. Evidence confirmed fallback-heavy final-score reconciliation, one-to-one provisional history, zero example score artifacts, explicit unattachable-finalist skips, full imported-plus-skipped cross-surface reconciliation, and exact selected-round confinement.
